member.name: T:IGEMSAPI.API
member.summary: IGEMS .NET API System looks for function public static void DLLMain() where you can register your parts

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.RegisterCommand(System.String,System.String,System.Drawing.Image,System.Action,System.Object)
member.summary: Register commands that can be called from the APPS in IGEMS
member.param: A unique ID for the command
Optional Tab to add the command to

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.AddToolbarTab(System.String)
member.summary: Adds a tab to the toolbar
member.returns: The tab object that can be used in RegisterCommand function

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.CheckLicense(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if the app is licensed. Shows a dialog if not.
member.returns: True if license ok False otherwise

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.InfoForm(System.String)
member.summary: Opens a non-modal dialog with a message. You must call Dispose to close this dialog

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.ToImage(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Help function to convert a byte array to an image Used to be able to use embedded image resources in .NET 8 In .NET 8 images are stored as byte arrays in the resources

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.WriteLine(System.String)
member.summary: Writes a line to the IGEMS command field

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.SaveMaterial
member.summary: Save the current material to file

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.SaveMachine
member.summary: Save the current machine to file

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.LoadMachine(System.String)
member.summary: Load a machine into the current drawing

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.LoadMaterial(System.String,System.String,System.Double)
member.summary: Load a material into the current drawing.

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.SelectMatMac
member.summary: Opens the select material and machine dialog

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.MaterialDisplayInfo
member.summary: Returns the display info for the current material

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.MaterialInfo
member.summary: Returns a dictionary with the material info

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.MachineInfo
member.summary: Returns a dictionary with the machine info

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.GetAllMaterials(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a list of all materials available for the current machine type The form is Name/Quality/Thickness

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.GetAllMachines
member.summary: Returns a list of all machines

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.EditLISPScript(System.String)
member.summary: Starts the LISP editor

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.ClearSelection
member.summary: Unselects all entities

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.Cleanup(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Object},System.Double)
member.summary: Cleans up the entities in the current drawing.

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.AddEntity(System.Object)
member.summary: Adds an existing entity to the current drawing

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.DrawLine(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Int32)
member.summary: Adds a line to the current drawing

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.DrawCircle(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Int32)
member.summary: Adds a circle to the current drawing

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.DrawArc(IGS.Genamo.Arc2d,System.Int32)
member.summary: Draws an circular arc

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.DrawPoly(IGS.Genamo.Poly2d,System.Int32)
member.summary: Adds a polyline to the current drawing

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.DrawRegion(IGS.Genamo.Region2d,System.Int32)
member.summary: Adds a region to the current drawing

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.DrawSolidRegion(IGS.Genamo.Region2d,System.Int32)
member.summary: Adds a region as a solid hatch entity

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.DrawRectangle(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Int32)
member.summary: Adds a rectangle (polyline) to the current drawing

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.DrawText(System.String,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Int32)
member.summary: Adds a text to the current drawing

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.DrawText(System.String,System.String,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Int32)
member.summary: Adds a text to the current drawing

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.DrawText(System.String,System.String,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: xjustify and yjustify are 0=left/bottom, 1=right/top, 2=center

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.DrawEllipse(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Int32)
member.summary: Draws an ellipse or elliptical arc
member.param: Start angle for elliptical arc default is 0
End angle for elliptical arc default is 2*PI

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.DrawPoint(System.Double,System.Double,System.Int32)
member.summary: Draws a point

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.GetPoint(System.String)
member.summary: Lets the user pick a point

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.GetPoint(System.String,System.Action{IGEMSAPI.Drawer})
member.summary: Lets the user pick a point. A callback function is called on mouse move

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.GetPoint(System.String,IGS.Genamo.Point2d,System.Action{IGEMSAPI.Drawer},System.Collections.Generic.List{IGS.Genamo.Pair{System.String,System.String}},System.String@)
member.summary: Advanced getpoint with callback and options

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.GetString(System.String,System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Lets the user enter a text.

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.GetPoint(System.String,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Lets the user pick a point using x,y as a basepoint

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.GetCorner(System.String,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Lets the user pick a rectangle from x,y

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.PickPart(System.String)
member.summary: Lets the user pick a part

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.PickEntity(System.String)
member.summary: Lets the user pick an entity

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.SelectParts(System.String)
member.summary: Lets the user select parts

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.PickSheet(System.String)
member.summary: Lets the user pick a sheet

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.SelectSheets(System.String)
member.summary: Lets the user select sheets

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.PickCutorder(System.String)
member.summary: Lets the user pick a cutorder

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.Select(System.String,System.Func{System.Object,System.Boolean})
member.summary: Select entities
member.returns: A list of selected entites or null is selection is canceled

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.SelectAll(System.Func{System.Object,System.Boolean})
member.summary: Selects all entities in the current drawing

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.SetSelected(System.Object,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Sets the selection status of an entity

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.GetVar(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Returns info about an entity Example to get the type of entity use key="TYPE" Note! the key value is case sensitive
member.returns: An object for the Value of the Key
member.exception: If the entity is not correct

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.GetVar(System.String)
member.summary: Get system variables like Shared path, Bin path etc PATHIMPORT: Path to the last imported file FILEIMPORT: File name of the last imported file PATHDATA: Path to the data folder PATHSHARED: Path to the shared folder PATHBIN: Path to the bin folder PATHROOT: Path to the root folder PATHTEMP: Path to the temp folder USERNAME: The current user name VERSION: The version of IGEMS BUILDTIME: The build time of IGEMS DIGFILE: The current drawing file name LANGUAGE: The current language VIEWAREA: The visible area of the drawing UNITS: 0 for metric, 1 for imperial, -1 if no drawing is open

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.CreateBlock(System.String,System.Double,System.Double,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Object})
member.summary: Create a block If name is "*" or starts with "*" an Anonymous block is created. Use InsertBlock to insert the block in the drawing
member.param: List of entitites in the block
member.returns: Return empty string if no block could be created otherwise the blockname is returned

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.InsertBlock(System.String,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Inserts a block at position x,y
member.returns: The inserted BlockReference entity or null if fail

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.CreateGroup(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Object})
member.summary: Groups entities into an anonymous block. Deletes the entitites and inserts the block Zero point is automatically calculated

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.SetVar(System.Object,System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Sets a value in an entity. Can be used to for example change the name of a part

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.GetLayers
member.summary: Returns a list of all layers in the current drawing

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.AddLayer(System.String)
member.summary: Adds a layer to the current drawing

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.DeleteLayer(System.String)
member.summary: Deletes a layer from the current drawing

member.name: P:IGEMSAPI.API.CurrentLayerName
member.summary: Name of the current layer

member.name: P:IGEMSAPI.API.CurrentLayerColor
member.summary: System.Drawing.Color of current layer

member.name: P:IGEMSAPI.API.CurrentLayerColorIndex
member.summary: Color index of current layer

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.IGEMSIntToColor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Converts an IGEMS index color to a System.Drawing.Color

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.GetXData(System.Object)
member.summary: Get all XDATA for an entity

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.GetXData(System.Object,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Get XDATA

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.SetXData(System.Object,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Set XDATA

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.ClearXData(System.Object)
member.summary: Removes all XDATA from an entity

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.Translate(System.Object,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Translates (moves) an entity without user interaction

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.Transform(System.Object,IGS.Genamo.Matrix2d)
member.summary: Transforms an entity

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.Rotate(System.Object,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Roates an entity with angle_radians around rx,ry

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.Mirror(System.Object,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Mirrors an entity through line from x1,y1 to x2,y2

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.Scale(System.Object,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Scale an entity using scalefactors sx and sy

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.Scale(System.Object,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Scales an entity using specified scale factors along the X and Y axes, with a given base point.
member.param: The entity to be scaled. This should be an object that can be converted to an Entity type.
The scale factor along the X axis.
The scale factor along the Y axis.
The X coordinate of the base point around which the scaling is performed.
The Y coordinate of the base point around which the scaling is performed.
member.returns: Returns true if the entity was successfully scaled; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.Delete(System.Object)
member.summary: Delete an entity

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.Move(System.Object,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Move an entity interactively. Use Translate if you want to move without user interaction.

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.Move(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Object},System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Move a list of entities interactively

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.Copy(System.Object)
member.summary: Copies an entity

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.Copy(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Object})
member.summary: Copies a list of entites
member.returns: A new list of copied entities

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.CopyToClipboard(System.Object)
member.summary: Copies the entity to the clipboard so it can be pasted to another drawing.

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.Redraw
member.summary: Redraws the screen to immediately display any changes

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.ZoomExtents
member.summary: Zooms extents

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.WorldToScreen(System.Double)
member.summary: Converts a distance in world units to screen units.
member.remarks: This method uses a predefined scaling factor to map world units to screen units. The scaling factor is determined by .
member.param: The distance in world units to be converted.
member.returns: The equivalent distance in screen units.

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.ScreenToWorld(System.Double)
member.summary: Converts screen pixels to a world distance using the current world scale.
member.param: The screen pixels to be converted.

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.ProcessStart(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Help function for ProcessStart

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.GetDataset(System.Object)
member.summary: Creates a DataSet with report data for a cutorder. This is the same data used in the postprocessor report
member.returns: A DataSet with data or null

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.Command(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Run a command Check the toolbar files for command names
member.param: Set to true if no prompts

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.ToRegion(System.Object)
member.summary: Converts an entity to a Region2d
member.returns: A Region2d of the entity geometry

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.NewDrawing
member.summary: Creates a new drawing

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.OpenDrawing(System.String)
member.summary: Opens a drawing of any of the supported file types

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.CloseCurrentDrawing
member.summary: Closes the current drawing without prompting to save

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.GetCurrentDrawing
member.summary: Gets the current drawing or null if no drawing is open

member.name: P:IGEMSAPI.API.Drawings
member.summary: A list of all open drawings

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.ActivateDrawing(System.Object)
member.summary: Activates a drawing

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.InsertDrawing(System.String)
member.summary: Inserts a drawing into the current drawing
member.param: Name of the drawing to insert

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.SaveDrawing(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Object})
member.summary: Saves a drawing or a list of entities. The extension controls the file type.

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.DrawingFileName
member.summary: Returns the filename of the current drawing

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.LockSheet(System.Object)
member.summary: Locks a sheet. Does not delete any sheets or parts.

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.Extents(System.Object)
member.summary: Calculates a bounding box of the entity. If entity is null a bounding box of all entites in the drawing is calculated

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.Extents(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Object})
member.summary: Calculates a bounding box for a list of entities
member.returns: A bound box for the entities

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.EntityType(System.Object)
member.summary: Returns the type of entity as a string. Example "PART", "SHEET", "LINE"

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.IsPart(System.Object)
member.summary: Checks if an entity is a part

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.IsSheet(System.Object)
member.summary: Checks if an entity is a sheet

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.IsCutorder(System.Object)
member.summary: Checks if an entity is a cutorder

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.GetColor(System.Object)
member.summary: Returns the color of the entity as an IGEMS indexed color. If the color is negative it is a RGB int color. 1=Red 2=Yellow 3=Green 4=Cyan 5=Blue 6=Magenta

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.SetColor(System.Object,System.Int32)
member.summary: Sets the color of an entity 1=Red 2=Yellow 3=Green 4=Cyan 5=Blue 6=Magenta

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.SetLineWeight(System.Object,System.Double)
member.summary: Sets the line weight of the specified entity to the given width.
member.remarks: The method converts the provided to an internal entity representation and updates its line weight based on the specified width. If the conversion fails, the method performs no action.
member.param: The entity whose line weight is to be set. Must be a valid object that can be converted to an entity.
The desired line weight, specified as a width in appropriate units. Must be a non-negative value.

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.CreatePart(IGS.Genamo.Region2d,System.String,System.Int32,System.String,System.DateTime)
member.summary: Create parts.

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.CreatePart(IGS.Genamo.Region2d,System.String,System.Int32,System.String,System.DateTime,System.Boolean,System.Double,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Object},System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Create parts full version
member.param: If geometry optimization should be performed

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.InsertPartText(System.Object,System.Double)
member.summary: Inserts parttext on a part

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.CreateSheet(System.String,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Creates a sheet

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.GetStandardSheets
member.summary: Returns a list of all standard sheets The list is in the format "Width,Height" The list is in imperial or metric depending on drawing

member.name: P:IGEMSAPI.API.Metric
member.summary: Returns true if the current drawing is metric

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.CurrentDrawing
member.summary: Returns the filename of the current drawing

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.Process(System.Object,System.String,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Post process a cutorder
member.param: If a report should be created
member.returns: The name of the generated file

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.CreateToolpath(System.Object)
member.summary: Generates toolpaths in the part using the Contour Cut settings

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.CreateToolpath(System.Object,IGS.Genamo.Point2d,System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Int32,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Generates a toolpath on a specific countour of a part
member.param: The part to add toolpath to

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.CreateToolpath(IGS.Genamo.Poly2d,System.Object,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a toolpath from a poly2d Optionally add to part
member.param: If null a voidpart is created

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.CreateCutoff(IGS.Genamo.Poly2d,System.Int32,System.Double,System.Int32,System.Double,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a cutoff from a poly2d

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.CreateBevelCut(IGS.Genamo.Poly2d,System.String,System.String,System.Double,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Double,System.Double,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a bevel cut from a poly2d
member.param: Angle in degrees, negative tilts to right, positive to the left
member.returns: The part with the bevel toolpath

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.CreateMarking(IGS.Genamo.Poly2d,System.Object,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a marking from a poly2d Optionally add to part
member.param: If null a voidpart is created

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.CreateRapid(IGS.Genamo.Poly2d,System.Object)
member.summary: Adds a rapid to the part.
member.param: The part to add the repid to

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.CreateMarking(IGS.Genamo.Point2d,System.Object,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a marking on other objects of a part closest to pt
member.param: If null a voidpart is created

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.CreateMarkingText(System.Object,System.Object,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a marking text on a part If part!=null the marking is attached to the part
member.param: Optional part to attch the marking to
member.returns: null if failed. The newly created part object or the part the marking is attached to

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.CreateHole(System.Int32,IGS.Genamo.Point2d,System.Double,System.Double,System.Object,System.String,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a hole on a part or as a void part
member.param: subroutine text height, only used for holeType==5
Quality 0=XFine 1=Fine 2=Medium 3=Rough 4=XRough 5=None, only used for cutting holeType=3
member.returns: Returns the new part or the part attaching the hole to

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.ClearInkjet(System.Object)
member.summary: Removes all inkjet from a part

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.AddInkjet(System.Object,System.String,IGS.Genamo.Point2d,System.Nullable{System.Double})
member.summary: Adds inkjet marking to a part
member.param: Text height or null for default

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.AddInkjet(System.Object,System.Object,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.param: Text entity to convert to inkjet

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.FindOtherIndex(System.Object,IGS.Genamo.Point2d,System.Boolean@)
member.summary: Finds the index of the other object or attached objects closest to the point
member.param: True if other object otherwise it is an attached object

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.FindContourIndex(System.Object,IGS.Genamo.Point2d)
member.summary: Finds the countour index of the part contour that is closest to the point
member.returns: The index of the closest contour to pt or -1 if fail

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.GetLead(System.String,System.Int32@,System.Double@,System.Double@,System.Double@,System.Double@,System.Double@,System.Double@,System.Double@)
member.summary: Gets a lead from the lead database for the current machine type. All values are in mm and degrees.

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.GetLeads(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get all database leads for the current machine type

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.GetPartGeometry(System.Object)
member.summary: Returns the geometry of a part as a list of poly2d.

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.GetPartOriginalGeometry(System.Object)
member.summary: Returns the parts original geometry as a region2d This is the geometry used when creating the part.

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.GetPartOtherObjects(System.Object)
member.summary: Returns the other objects of a part as a list of poly2d.

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.GetPartAttachedObjects(System.Object)
member.summary: Returns the attached objects of a part as a list of entities. This is for example texts added as other objects to a part.

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.AddOtherObject(System.Object,System.Object)
member.summary: Adds an other object to an existing part
member.param: The entity to add as an other object

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.SetQuality(System.Object,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Paints a quality onto a part
member.param: The contour index to Geometry list

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.Cutorder(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Object})
member.summary: Creates a cutorder

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.AddPartToCutorder(System.Object,System.Object)
member.summary: Adds a part to an existing cutorder

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.CutorderParts(System.Object)
member.summary: Return the parts in a cutorder

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.CutorderNCFile(System.Object)
member.summary: The NC-file of the cutorder

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.SetBackgroundColor(System.Drawing.Color,System.Drawing.Color)
member.summary: Sets the background color of the current drawing to a gradient with the specified top and bottom colors.

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.GetBackgroundColor
member.summary: Gets the background color of the current drawing. If gradient background is enabled, it returns the top and bottom colors of the gradient. If gradient background is disabled, both colors will be the same as the solid background color.

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.Image(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Object},System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Nullable{System.Drawing.Color})
member.summary: Creates an Image from entities

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.ReportImage(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Object},System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Nullable{System.Drawing.Color})
member.summary: Creates an Image from entities. Special for reports. Will obey the report plot settings

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.Image(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Object},System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Nullable{System.Drawing.Color})
member.summary: Create an Image from entities

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.Image(System.Object,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Nullable{System.Drawing.Color})
member.summary: Creates an Image from an entity

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.Image(System.Object,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Nullable{System.Drawing.Color})
member.summary: Creates an Image from an entity

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.PartImage(System.Object,System.Int32)
member.summary: Create an image of a part.

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.AddImage(System.Drawing.Image,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Adds an Image to the drawing

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.Report(System.String,System.Data.DataSet,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Boolean,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Runs a report Note. If a resfile is set the report will not be opened but saved to the file Note. If print is set to true the report will be printed to the default printer and the report will not be opened
member.param: Flag to decide if attached documents should be appended to the report
If set the report will automatically save to this file. The report will not be opened just generated
If true the report will be printed to the default printer

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.Report(System.String,System.Data.DataSet,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Runs a report Note. If a resfile is set the report will not be opened but saved to the file
member.param: Flag to decide if attached documents should be appended to the report
If set the report will automatically save to this file. The report will not be opened just generated

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.GetPartInfo(System.Object)
member.summary: Returns a PartInfo object with part information

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.SetPartInfo(IGEMSAPI.PartInfo)
member.summary: Update the part with a PartInfo object

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.GetSheetInfo(System.Object)
member.summary: Returns a SheetInfo object with sheet information

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.SetSheetInfo(IGEMSAPI.SheetInfo)
member.summary: Update the sheet with the SheetInfo

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.GetPartsInsideSheet(System.Object)
member.summary: Returns a list of all parts on the drawing that is inside the sheet

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.GetCutorderOnSheet(System.Object)
member.summary: Returns the cutorder on the sheet
member.returns: The cutorder or null if no cutorder exists

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.NestCreate(System.Double)
member.summary: Create a Nest object used for AutoNesting

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.NestSet(System.Object,System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Set AutoNest settings...more info needed

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.NestAddPart(System.Object,System.Object)
member.summary: Add a Part to the nesting

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.NestAddEntity(System.Object,System.Object,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Add any entity to nesting

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.NestAddSheet(System.Object,System.Object)
member.summary: Add a sheet to the nesting

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.NestAddSheet(System.Object,System.Object,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Object})
member.summary: Add a sheet to the nesting with obstacles. Obstacles can be any entity but typically they will be other sheets or cutorders that are on the same sheet. The obstacles will be used during nesting to avoid placing parts on top of them. If the obstacle is an EntityPart the actual part geometry will be used as an obstacle if not the bounding box of the entity will be used as an obstacle. This means that if you want to use a cutorder as an obstacle you should place the cutorder on the sheet and then add the sheet with the cutorder as an obstacle to the nesting.

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.NestAddSheet(System.Object,System.Double,System.Double,System.Int32,System.Double)
member.summary: Adds a sheet to the nesting

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.NestRun(System.Object,System.Double)
member.summary: Perform Auto nesting
member.param: The times in seconds to nest
member.returns: The nested entities parts and sheets

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.NestOpen(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Object},System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Object})
member.summary: Opens the AutoNest dialog and starts nesting

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.MousePosWorld
member.summary: Gets the current mouse position in world coordinates

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.MousePosScreen
member.summary: Gets the current mouse position in screen coordinates

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.API.ScreenSize
member.summary: Size of the screen in pixels

member.name: T:IGEMSAPI.Drawer
member.summary: Class to manage drawing of tempory graphics All functions ending with T are for world coordinate drawing and all other functions are for screen coordinate drawing.

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.Drawer.RegisterCallback(System.Action{IGEMSAPI.Drawer})
member.summary: Register a function that will be called every time the temporary graphics need sto be redrawn

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.Drawer.ClearCallbacks
member.summary: Remove all callback functions

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.Drawer.Redraw
member.summary: Redraws the temporary graphics. Calls all registered callback functions

member.name: P:IGEMSAPI.Drawer.Pos
member.summary: The mouse position in World coordinates

member.name: P:IGEMSAPI.Drawer.Color
member.summary: Set the color

member.name: P:IGEMSAPI.Drawer.LineWeight
member.summary: Set the lineweight

member.name: P:IGEMSAPI.Drawer.LineStyle
member.summary: Set the line style 0 Continuous 1 Dash 2 Dot 3 DashDot 4 DashDotDot

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.Drawer.DrawLineT(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Draws a line in using world coordinates

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.Drawer.DrawLine(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Draws a line using screen coordinates

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.Drawer.DrawMarkT(System.Double,System.Double,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Draws a mark ot x,y in world coordinates See DrawMark for mark types

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.Drawer.DrawMarkT(IGS.Genamo.Point2d,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Draws a mark at pos in world coordinates See DrawMark for mark types

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.Drawer.DrawMark(System.Double,System.Double,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Draws a mark type None = 0, LargeCross = 1, Cross = 2, DiagonalCross = 4, Slit = 8, Pixel = 16, Circle = 32, Triangle = 64, Diamond = 128, Rectangle = 256, FilledRectangle = 512, Roof = 1024, Floor = 2048, Perpendicular = 4096, Ellipsis = 8192

member.name: T:IGEMSAPI.Organizer
member.summary: API functions to read/write to the Organizer database

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.Organizer.Get(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Gets the value for a part in organizer

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.Organizer.Find(System.String)
member.summary: Returns a list of database ids for all parts with name=partname

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.Organizer.Set(System.Int32,System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Sets a value for a part in organizer

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.Organizer.InsertPart(System.Int32)
member.summary: Inserts a part from the organizer DB in the current drawing

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.Organizer.RegisterPart(System.Object,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Registers a part in the organizer database
member.param: If the released flag should be set
member.returns: -1 if fail otherwise the Part ID

member.name: T:IGEMSAPI.SheetDB
member.summary: API functions to work with the Sheet database

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.SheetDB.Get(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Get a value from the database

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.SheetDB.Set(System.Int32,System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Set a value in the sheet database

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.SheetDB.RegisterSheet(System.Object,System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Register a sheet. Removes the sheet from the drawing. If addparts=true all parts inside the sheet will be saved with the sheet and the parts will be removed from the drawing. If locksheet=true and addparts=false the sheet will be locked and the parts will be removed from the drawing

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.SheetDB.InsertSheet(System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Inserts a sheet into the current drawing. It's up to the user to make sure the correct material is loaded. If the wrong material is loaded a warning message will be displayed.
member.param: If the database should count down quantity
member.returns: A sheet or null on fail

member.name: T:IGEMSAPI.ToolpathSettings
M:IGEMSAPI.ToolpathSettings.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes all properties to the toolpath settings for the current machine.

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.ToolpathSettings.Save
member.summary: Saves the settings

member.name: P:IGEMSAPI.ToolpathSettings.Sorting
member.summary: Sorting property 0=Closest 1=Zig zag 2=Left to right 3=Right to left 4=Spread 5=None

member.name: P:IGEMSAPI.ToolpathSettings.Contours
member.summary: Contours 0=Add new and replace existing 1=Replace existing 2=Add new 3=Individual

member.name: P:IGEMSAPI.ToolpathSettings.PlacementExternal
member.summary: 0=Auto 1=Bottom-Left 2=Bottom-Middle 3=Bottom-Right 4=Middle-Left 5=Middle-Right 6=Top-Left 7=Top-Middle 8=Top-Right 9=Longest segment

member.name: P:IGEMSAPI.ToolpathSettings.PlacementInternal
member.summary: 0=Auto 1=Bottom-Left 2=Bottom-Middle 3=Bottom-Right 4=Middle-Left 5=Middle-Right 6=Top-Left 7=Top-Middle 8=Top-Right 9=Longest segment

member.name: P:IGEMSAPI.ToolpathSettings.ExternalDirection
member.summary: 0=Tool on left CW 1=Tool on right CCW 2=No compensation CCW 3=No compensation CW

member.name: P:IGEMSAPI.ToolpathSettings.InternalDirection
member.summary: 0=Tool on left CW 1=Tool on right CCW 2=No compensation CCW 3=No compensation CW

member.name: T:IGEMSAPI.PartInfo
member.summary: Class with Part information

member.name: P:IGEMSAPI.PartInfo.Area
member.summary: Return area in m2

member.name: P:IGEMSAPI.PartInfo.Weight
member.summary: Returns weight in Kg

member.name: P:IGEMSAPI.PartInfo.ToolDist
member.summary: Distance between tools

member.name: P:IGEMSAPI.PartInfo.Rot
member.summary: Rotation step 0=Auto 1=None 2=180 3=90 4=45

member.name: P:IGEMSAPI.PartInfo.Priority
member.summary: Highest=1 High=2 Normal=3 Low=4 Lowest=5 None=6

member.name: T:IGEMSAPI.SheetInfo
member.summary: Class with sheet information

member.name: T:IGEMSAPI.PAR
member.summary: Geometry functions for parametric parts System looks for function public static void DLLParamParts() where you can register your parts

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.PAR.RegisterParametricPart(System.String,System.String,System.Drawing.Image,System.Func{System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Double},System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Object}},IGEMSAPI.PARVal[])
member.summary: Register a parametric part
member.param: Display image or null. Preffered size 400x400

member.summary: Creates an ellipse or elliptical arc
member.param: Start angle for elliptical arc default is 0
End angle for elliptical arc default is 2*PI

member.summary: Clean up any resources being used.
member.param: true if managed resources should be disposed; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:IGEMSAPI.InfoForm.InitializeComponent
member.summary: Required method for Designer support - do not modify the contents of this method with the code editor.
